log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vampire — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Vampire — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Vampire — Winged Striker HP: 54/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Vampire — Winged Striker HP: 39/67
--- Vampire — Winged Striker --- HP: 39/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
